L0.name: per-piece consent
L0.rule: every published piece needs an explicit client click — the default forever until earned

L1.name: pre-approved batch
L1.rule: PROPOSABLE (never auto-granted) after 10 consecutive unchanged approvals; requires explicit per-batch client consent; any edit/rejection resets the counter

consent_mechanics.consent_unit: the BATCH, never the post — one ✅ covers the whole listed batch
consent_mechanics.batch_manifest: every L1 batch ships with its card list (dates + ULIDs); consent binds ONLY to that list

consent_event.subject: batch:<batch_id>
consent_event.note: scope: the manifest as sent — additions need a new consent

consent_mechanics.resets: any ✏️ edit or ❌ rejection inside a consented batch → counter resets AND the batch reverts to per-piece review
consent_mechanics.expiry: consent covers ONE batch; the next batch asks again — L1 is per-batch, never standing
consent_mechanics.ceiling: batch size <= 20 (the gate law); larger = split into consented batches

L2.name: managed
L2.rule: client delegates within agreed red-lines + monthly receipt review; MOHAMED must co-sign the upgrade; one culture_breach drops back to L0

law: trust climbs by COUNTED approvals, never by time; AI may never advance a level
